title: linaria multicaulis var. diffusa
intro: Linaria multicaulis var. diffusa is a perennial plant also known as toadflax or devil's fuge, belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Linaria multicaulis var. diffusa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its use as a treatment for skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
